recommendations.title: Backfill outpacing drain — throttle re-enrich requeue
recommendations.action: reduce backfill to <= drain (e.g. 20k/30min) OR pause until pending drains; 1.3M re-enrich backlog already queued

recommendations.title: CRAWL-bound (not DB-bound) — more lanes/workers won't lift the rate
recommendations.finding: active PG conns 2 of 100 (low) -> writes are free; ceiling is HTTP crawl latency
recommendations.action: adding async lanes/workers gives little; to break the >2k ceiling, attack crawl latency

recommendations.title: Break the crawl-bound ceiling WITHOUT hardware: BULK-CRAWL (Common Crawl)
recommendations.finding: crawl-bound; combined ~232/min, InterServer ~0/min on httpx. Operator decision: NO 3rd box.
recommendations.action: BIG-BET (escalate): enrich from Common Crawl CDX index + WAT/WET (free, lawful) for records whose homepage CC already has -> removes the live per-site round-trip for that share -> higher throughput on the SAME two boxes. CC small-biz coverage is partial, so it is a COMPLEMENT to live crawl, not a replacement. (3rd box is OFF the table per operator.)

recommendations.title: Source-hunter hourly cadence is appropriate
recommendations.finding: hunter OnUnitActiveSec=1h (12min first-run); source discovery is low-churn
recommendations.action: keep hourly; no need to run faster for source discovery

auto_safe.title: Backfill outpacing drain — throttle re-enrich requeue
auto_safe.action: reduce backfill to <= drain (e.g. 20k/30min) OR pause until pending drains; 1.3M re-enrich backlog already queued
